---
title: |
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:15px;">
    <img src="637382017185780333+290935.avif" style="height:70px;">
    <span>GP4 - Mini Campaign Plan</span>
  </div>
author: "Group 5: Luis Ahumada, Spencer Conway, Carmen Jimenez Rodriguez, Leeann Lewis-Waddell, & Georgia Monjarrez"
date: today
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
---

# Business problem or opportunity

# Campaign objective

# Target audience

# Core campaign message

# Channel strategy

# Omnichannel flow

# Campaign tactics

# Budget recommendation

# KPIs

# Optimization plan

# Appendix

-   [GitHub Repo](https://github.com/lewiswaddell/GP4.git)

-   [GitHub Page](https://lewiswaddell.github.io/GP4/)
